headline: How The Western Digital (WDC) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And AI Storage Themes
summary: Western Digital’s modeled fair value has shifted sharply, with the target moving from US$186.96 to US$321.00 in the latest work. That kind of reset lines up with recent Street research, where firms like Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan have been lifting price targets by anything from roughly US$10 to more than US$145 as they refresh their views. Read on to see what is driving these changes and how you can track the story as it evolves. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Western Digital shifts by...
